title: Set up fresh clone local environment
description: Track local setup after a fresh clone: install Python and Node dependencies, run migrations, hydrate bd issues from JSONL, verify quality gates, and start the app locally.
close_reason: Local setup completed: Python and Node dependencies installed, migrations applied, checks passed, bd issue database hydrated, and app verified healthy on 127.0.0.1:8000.

title: Upgrade frontend test toolchain to resolve npm audit findings
description: npm audit reports 5 moderate vulnerabilities through vitest/vite/esbuild. The suggested npm audit fix requires a breaking update to esbuild 0.28.0, so this should be handled intentionally with frontend test and build verification.
close_reason: Updated frontend dev toolchain to vitest 4.1.5 and esbuild 0.28.0, rebuilt committed bundle, and verified npm audit reports zero vulnerabilities.

title: Document Windows fresh-clone bd bootstrap
description: Fresh Windows setup required Dolt on PATH, bd init/doctor repair, creating the beads Dolt database, importing .beads/issues.jsonl, and setting dolt.database=beads. Document the expected bootstrap path so the next fresh clone is smoother.
